meaning: adj.百合样的,海百合类的n.海百合类
examples: Marine reptiles and echinoderm crinoid that feature intact and delicate preservation and large quantity serve as the mark.
While we were diving over a beautiful untouched reef, I noticed this crinoid in the distance because of its unusual colors.
In 1992, the author found fossil crinoid stems in crystalline limestone at Xia-zhuang, Wenchuan, which were determined to be of Ordovician age.
